{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Urzaia's Vessel
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia]] has a gold hide wrapped around his upper arm which is his [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
